---
name: Methodology question
about: Ask about scoring, weights, scope, or the rationale for a design decision
title: "[Question] "
labels: question
---

## Your question

What about the methodology is unclear or worth discussing?

## Context

What were you trying to do when this came up? (Implementing a scanner, reviewing the spec for a peer evaluation, comparing to another methodology, etc.)

## What you've already checked

Brief list — saves maintainers time. For example:
- [ ] Read `SPEC.md` (specifically section: ___)
- [ ] Checked `CHANGELOG.md` for recent changes
- [ ] Searched existing Issues and Discussions
- [ ] Reviewed the [correlation-research](https://github.com/respectarium/agent-adoption-research) for empirical context

## Is this a Discussion or an Issue?

If you're asking a question to understand the spec → consider opening a [Discussion](../../discussions) instead. If you believe the spec has a methodological issue that needs fixing → continue with this Issue.
